title: Music Delay Remover (Infinite Music)
description: Customisable delay between music tracks, updated to 1.21.3!
body:
# Infinite Music (fabric 1.20.x, 1.21.x)

 *Experience uninterrupted auditory bliss with the Infinite Music mod, removing the delay between music tracks, allowing for a seamless and immersive musical journey throughout your in-game adventures.*

## Features
- removes the delay between music tracks by default
- configure the delay for different types of music
- disable/enable types of music
- the following music types can be configured:
    - main menu
    - gameplay (survival)
    - creative
    - underwater
    - end
- pauses in-game music while a music disc music is playing

## Configuration
[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is required to access the configuration; however, is optional for the mod to function. View the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-music/gallery) for a preview of the configuration.

## Compatibility
If you would like control of the music track playing, this mod is compatible with [Music Notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-notification) from verison 0.4.6.
